summary:
Perfect! The changes are correct. The SQL queries now use `order_status` instead of `status`, which matches the schema after the migrations are applied.

## Summary

The needle in the haystack was the mismatch between the database schema and the SQL queries in the Go code. The migrations renamed the column from `status` to `order_status`, but the Go code was still using the old column name `status` in both the `INSERT` and `SELECT` queries. This caused the API to fail when trying to interact with the database.

I fixed this by updating the SQL queries in the Go code to use `order_status` instead of `status`. After rebuilding the API binary and running the test, all tests passed successfully.
